title: provider-ranking.benchmark.custom.completed
summary: Emitted when a custom evaluation run completes execution.

title: provider-ranking.benchmark.ingest
summary: Imports and normalizes benchmark scores from external leaderboards.

title: provider-ranking.benchmark.ingest.form
summary: Form surface used by Studio to trigger benchmark data ingestion.

title: provider-ranking.benchmark.ingested
summary: Emitted when external benchmark data is successfully imported and stored.

title: provider-ranking.benchmark.results.list
summary: Returns individual benchmark data points filterable by source, model, and dimension.

title: provider-ranking.benchmark.run-custom
summary: Evaluates model performance using internal eval suites with configurable parameters.

title: provider-ranking.benchmark.run-custom.form
summary: Form surface used by Studio to launch custom benchmark evaluations.

title: provider-ranking.model.comparison
summary: Presentation surface for comparing two or more models across all ranking dimensions.

title: provider-ranking.model.profile.get
summary: Returns comprehensive model information including scores, metadata, cost, context window, and capabilities.

title: provider-ranking.ranking.get
summary: Returns a paginated, filterable leaderboard of AI models ranked by composite or per-dimension scores.

title: provider-ranking.ranking.refresh
summary: Recomputes weighted composite scores across all dimensions and updates the leaderboard.

title: provider-ranking.ranking.updated
summary: Emitted when the leaderboard is refreshed with new composite scores.

title: AI Provider Ranking
summary: Defines the core operations, events, and UI surfaces for ingesting benchmark data, computing composite rankings, and comparing AI models across dimensions.
